goal_alignment.sparse_mla_single_gpu: Materialize TileLang sparse-MLA backward by fusing the whole boundary: q, dO, shared/compressed KV, LI indices, output/lse/sink, no selected-KV/probability HBM slabs.
goal_alignment.moe_mori_multi_gpu: Materialize MORI/AITER MoE gains in sustained 4x/8x MI350 TFLOPs by reducing owner-rank VJP tail and dX return skew without replacing the AITER fused forward floor.

cpu_only_import_attempt.reason: ROCm/HIP JIT runtime was not available in the CPU-only docker run; aiter.fmoe was not registered. Treat source inspection as authoritative for API contract, not as GPU runtime validation.

source_evidence: fused_moe(...) calls fused_moe_(...) and returns its value.
fused_moe_(...) either returns metadata.stage1(...) for one-stage paths or fused_moe_2stages(...).
fused_moe_2stages(...) allocates a2, calls metadata.stage1(...), calls metadata.stage2(...), then returns moe_out.

internal_intermediates.sorted_ids: created by moe_sorting inside fused_moe_, not returned
internal_intermediates.sorted_weights: created by moe_sorting inside fused_moe_, not returned
internal_intermediates.sorted_expert_ids: created by moe_sorting inside fused_moe_, not returned
internal_intermediates.num_valid_ids: created by moe_sorting inside fused_moe_, not returned
internal_intermediates.moe_buf: created by moe_sorting and used as final moe output buffer
internal_intermediates.a2: post-stage1 hidden, generally silu(gate) * up for the BF16 separated SwiGLU/Silu-style path; allocated and consumed inside fused_moe_2stages, not returned

missing_for_training_backward: unweighted per-route compact expert output for dTopkWeight
stable returned route metadata needed to avoid a second sort/pack in backward

decision.demoted_path: TORCHTITAN_MORI_AITER_FORWARD_MODE=padded_saved remains demoted because it saves gate/up/hidden/compact_out only by replacing AITER fused forward with a slower padded PyTorch-style forward.
decision.promoted_contract: Keep AITER fused forward as the floor. Add or port an AITER-compatible training contract: either fused_moe_training_forward returns route metadata plus a2/gate/up/compact_out with negligible forward overhead, or a fused owner VJP recomputes gate/up/compact_out internally using the same AITER/CK grouped schedule.
decision.why_a2_only_is_not_enough: A2 can help W2 wgrad, but backward still needs gate/up for SwiGLU derivative and compact_out for dTopkWeight; the previous stage1-hidden-only probe was effectively neutral.

next_moe_gate.local_latency_gate: Beat the EP8 owner-rank padded VJP envelope without slowing AITER forward: retained padded/Triton-SwiGLU VJP ~6.4 ms, ideal saved gate/up/hidden+compact_out ~4.77-4.96 ms.
next_moe_gate.e2e_promotion_gate: Promote only after >=6-step 4x S4096 GBS64 and then 8x S4096 GBS128 runs improve late-step TFLOPs/GPU and peak memory versus the current no-AC + expandable allocator sustained 8x anchor of 64.91 TFLOPs/GPU.

current_whole_boundary_state.source_hsk_bridge: Correct but slow: exports BF16 probs/grad_logits_scaled HSK slabs, then selected-limit dKV consumes them. S4096 median was 58.799 ms; export kernel alone was about 34.8 ms.
current_whole_boundary_state.source_direct_atomic: Closest no-HSK source-boundary scaffold: consumes q/dO/kv/indices/output/lse directly, but still does per-selected-row dKV atomics. S4096 median was 42.540 ms.
current_whole_boundary_state.source_direct_group_owned: Rejected: avoids HSK slabs and reduces before global atomics, but group-owned CTAs recompute/reload full-D QK/PV too many times and destroy query-major reuse.

promoted_contract: Start from the no-HSK direct-source boundary, not from materialized probs/grad_logits.
Keep query-major row ownership for QK, probabilities, scaled dP, dQ, and dKV contribution math.
Inside that query-major producer, add group-aware segmented/tile-local dKV accumulation keyed by compressed group.
Write compact reduced partial rows or reduced atomics, then use the already-cheap final fold/reduce.
Do not materialize selected-KV, probs, or grad_logits HBM slabs.

first_sparse_gate.single_gpu_shape: 1xMI350, S=4096, H=64, D=512, compressed groups=1024, compressed topk=512
first_sparse_gate.latency_gate_1: Beat the 42.5 ms no-HSK direct atomic whole-boundary path.
first_sparse_gate.latency_gate_2: Then beat the older 8.0-8.8 ms compressed dKV sparse-atomic slice without HSK slabs.
first_sparse_gate.promotion_gate: Only after whole-boundary latency improves should TorchTitan e2e TFLOPs/memory A/B be run.

next_actions: MoE/MORI: add an AITER-side training-forward/backward contract or a local probe that calls AITER moe_sorting + stage1/stage2 directly and exposes a2/route metadata without replacing fused forward; reject if it slows forward before owner VJP improves.

Sparse MLA: implement the query-major no-HSK segmented dKV producer in TileLang/HIP using the source_direct path as correctness scaffold and the selected-limit route plan for group-aware epilogue reduction.
For either track, do not promote an isolated kernel win until sustained 4x/8x TFLOPs/GPU and peak memory improve over the current retained baseline.
